title: Together for more prosperous Apuan Alps: Current threats and future resolutions
description: A participatory appraisal summarizing the main threats to the chestnut flour value chain in Alta Versilia and proposing future resolutions to strengthen its resilience. It highlights stakeholder-identified drivers such as climate and demographic changes, loss of traditional practices, and inefficient incentive allocation, and outlines recommendations for enhanced governance, financial aid distribution, knowledge sharing, and biodiversity protection.
